

Angeles, M.D. delos, Radbouchoom, S., Ngarega, B.K., Lapuz, R.S. &
Schneider, H. (2025) [Spatial diversity and distribution of fern and
lycophyte species in karst and non-karst landscapes towards conservation
needs](https://doi.org/10.3389/fpls.2025.1495796). *Frontiers in Plant
Science*, **16**.

Camacho, G.P., Loss, A.C., Fisher, B.L. & Blaimer, B.B. (2025) [A
zoogeographic model for the evolution of diversity and endemism in
madagascar](https://doi.org/10.1002/ecog.07661). *Ecography*, **2025**.

Fernandes, N.B.G., Moraes, A.M. & Milward-de-Azevedo, M.A. (2025)
[Diversity, distribution, and conservation of passiflora species
(passifloraceae) in serra da bocaina,
brazil](https://doi.org/10.1590/2175-7860202576060). *Rodriguésia*,
**76**.

Hao, D.-C., Wang, Y., Chen, Z.-D., Lu, L.-M. & Xiao, P.-G. (2025)
[Spatial phylogenetics and biocultural conservation of medicinal plants
in ethnic minority communities of china: Implications for environmental
sustainability](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10531-025-03239-y).
*Biodiversity and Conservation*, **35**.

Jaén Molina, R., Patiño, J., Cruz, S. de la, Olangua‐Corral, M.,
Marrero, Á., García‐Verdugo, C. & Caujapé‐Castells, J. (2025)
[Integrating a phylogenetic framework for mapping biodiversity patterns
to set conservation priorities for an oceanic island
flora](https://doi.org/10.1111/csp2.70023). *Conservation Science and
Practice*, **7**.

Li, B., Deane, D.C., Yang, M., Wang, J., Lu, Z., Guan, Y., Lu, X.,
Zhang, Y., Hu, J., Yu, F. & Yu, H. (2025) [Implementing a
30](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.gecco.2025.e03988). *Global Ecology and
Conservation*, **64**, 03988.

Martínez de León, R. & Moreno‐Letelier, A. (2025) [Spatiotemporal
diversification of global junipers: Traces of niche conservatism and
trait‐dependent diversification](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.70910).
*Ecology and Evolution*, **15**.

Montemayor, S.I., Castro-Huertas, V., Minghetti, E. & Moreira, F.F.F.
(2025) [Identifying high-priority conservation areas in the atlantic
forest: A multicriteria approach using water
striders](https://doi.org/10.1007/s10531-025-03142-6). *Biodiversity and
Conservation*, **34**, 4335--4357.

Morales-Garduño, L. & Villaseñor, J.L. (2025) [Spatial and phylogenetic
distribution of the genera of the heliantheae tribe (asteraceae) in
mexico](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.3661). *Botanical Sciences*,
**103**, 678--694.

Nge, F.J., Biffin, E., Thornhill, A.H., Dijk, K. van & Waycott, M.
(2025) [Phylogenomic incongruence leads to different spatial
phylogenetic patterns: An australian continental scale case study with
isopogon and petrophile (proteaceae)](https://doi.org/10.1071/sb25001).
*Australian Systematic Botany*, **38**.

Pérez-Aragón, M., Rivera, R., Oerder, V., González, C.E., Hernández,
C.E. & Escribano, R. (2025) [The influence of environmental stability
and upwelling variation on copepod diversity in the humboldt current
system off chile](https://doi.org/10.3389/fevo.2025.1527735). *Frontiers
in Ecology and Evolution*, **13**.

Ramírez-García, E. & Krömer, T. (2025) [Distribución y estado de
conservación de las especies del género bartlettina (eupatorieae,
asteraceae) endémicas de méxico](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.3585).
*Botanical Sciences*, **103**, 524--543.

Roquer, F.T., Jara-Arancio, P., Vicencio, R.S. & Arroyo, M.T.K. (2025)
[Contribution of altos de chicauma to the protection of phylogenetic
diversity of the flora in the metropolitan region of santiago,
chile](https://gayanabotanica.cl/index.php/gb/article/view/593). *Gayana
Botanica*, **82**, 156--169.

Ruiz-Valdez, M.V., Ortiz, E., Martínez-Gordillo, M.J., Villaseñor, J.L.
& Soto-Tejo, F. (2025) [Riqueza, distribución y endemismo del género
brickellia (asteraceae,
eupatorieae)](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.3705). *Botanical
Sciences*, **103**, 794--807.

Samayoa, A.P., Aguirre, J.D., Smith, A.N.H. & Liggins, L. (2025)
[Centres of species richness, neoendemism, and paleoendemism for marine
fishes occur in different regions of aotearoa new
zealand](https://doi.org/10.21425/fob.18.134560). *Frontiers of
Biogeography*, **18**.

Saqib, S., Ullah, F., Omollo, W.O., Liu, Y., Tao, H.-Y., Zaman, W.,
Temur, A., Liu, B., Lai, Y., Chen, Z., Fang, Y.-P., Dong, H.-J., Wang,
W.-Y., Zhao, X.-M. & Xiong, Y.-C. (2025) [Identifying hotspots and
climate drivers of alien plant species for conservation prioritization
across the pan-himalaya](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biocon.2025.110994).
*Biological Conservation*, **302**, 110994.

Vieira-Alencar, J.P.S., Carmignotto, A.P., Sawaya, R.J., Silveira, L.F.,
Valdujo, P.H. & Campos Nogueira, C. de (2025) [Hotspot getting hotter:
Increased knowledge on tetrapod endemism, habitat loss and the plight of
the most threatened savanna in the
world](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.biocon.2025.111087). *Biological
Conservation*, **305**, 111087.

Villaseñor, J.L., Ortiz-Bermúdez, E. & Meave, J.A. (2025) [Floristic
diversity of the tropical rainforest in
mexico](https://doi.org/10.17129/botsci.3681). *Botanical Sciences*,
**103**, 899--916.

Yusupov, Z., Turginov, O., Karimov, B., Buxorov, G. & Tojibaev, K.
(2025) [Fritillaria yakutiae sp. Nov. (Liliaceae) from surkhandarya,
uzbekistan](https://doi.org/10.1002/njb.04813). *Nordic Journal of
Botany*, **2025**.

Zhao, S., Guo, Y. & Zhao, X. (2025) [Spatial mismatch between in-situ
conservation and diversity hotspots of chinese native useful vascular
plants](https://doi.org/10.1016/j.geosus.2024.100252). *Geography and
Sustainability*, **6**, 100252.

Zheng, X., Chen, X., Qu, T., Zhang, Y., Shao, Y., Zhang, B., Fu, Z. &
Zhang, X. (2025) [Spatial phylogenetics reveals endemism hotspots and
conservation priorities in chinese
asteraceae](https://doi.org/10.1002/ece3.72403). *Ecology and
Evolution*, **15**.
